chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 131 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.03.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Mukesh Kumar, Advocate along with applicant Complaiantn present in person Ms. Sana Memon APG along with I.O I have been informed that co-accused Azhar has been granted bail by learned IIIrd Senior Civil Judge, Shaheed Benazirabad on 13.3.2026. The role of the present applicant is exactly the same as Azhar’s, therefore, he too deserves the same concession on the ground of rule of consistency. Accordingly the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
